column1: This policy is right because it's what our founding fathers would have wanted.
Real Americans know this is the only solution
column2: and anyone who disagrees hates our country.

column1: The opposing party always destroys everything they touch

column1: If we allow this
column2: it's a slippery slope that will inevitably lead to totalitarian dictatorship.

column1: The media won't cover this story
column2: which proves there's a massive conspiracy to hide the truth.

column1: My opponent's policy failed in one city fifteen years ago
column2: so it can never work anywhere.

column1: Either we implement my plan exactly as proposed
column2: or the entire nation will collapse into chaos.

column1: This common-sense solution is obvious to anyone with basic intelligence and patriotic values.

column2: so we can ignore any data that contradicts our position.

column1: Our side represents hardworking families while they represent coastal elites who hate ordinary people.

column2: so changing it now would betray everything we stand for.

column1: The policy sounds complicated

column1: My personal experience in business means I understand economics better than any expert or economist.

column2: then you're actively working against the interests of the nation.

column1: They always use the same playbook

column1: The fact that other countries tried this proves it's foreign and un-American and wrong for us.

We don't need studies or data when basic common sense tells us what the right answer is.

column2: making them equivalent to that dictator.

column1: If we compromise even slightly

column1: The mainstream experts all agree

column1: This policy works in my district

column1: They changed their position

column1: The problem is simple and anyone who says it's complicated is making excuses for inaction.

column1: The election results prove the people agree with everything we proposed down to the smallest detail.
